mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate applied to equity cash flows, directly lifting S&P 500 valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rate-cut periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 4.5% within a single month, it signals a labor market inflection that historically precedes recessionary equity drawdowns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in industrial production and a sharp drop in business inventories indicates a demand-supply mismatch that compresses corporate margins, driving negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative 20d returns in >60% of co-occurring contraction episodes, or partial correlation with forward returns drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-interest-rate environment, a sustained decline in housing starts acts as a leading indicator of broader credit tightening, which suppresses equity valuations over a 5-day horizon.
failure_condition: Housing starts decline while SPX 5d forward returns are positive in >50% of observations during the specified regime, or the signal shows no predictive power in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index exceeds 315, persistent inflation erodes real yields and forces equity risk premium expansion, depressing forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or outperform baseline when CPIAUCSL breaches 315, or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Steady month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains consumer spending power, which supports corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns in payroll-growth months are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where real estate financing expands while industrial production stagnates signals speculative asset allocation rather than productive growth, leading to equity mean reversion over the next month.
failure_condition: The divergence signal fails to predict negative 20d returns in >55% of observed episodes, or the interaction term in a multivariate regression is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: When quarterly real GDP growth decelerates below 1.5% annualized, it triggers a corporate earnings downgrade cycle that suppresses equity valuations over the subsequent quarter.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly growth rate falls below 1.5%
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in >50% of instances where GDPC1 growth drops below 1.5%, or the signal exhibits no edge in a 5-year walk-forward backtest.
